summary: Cluster is read-only for Clownfish because the hydrated primary refs are marked security-sensitive around credential propagation/auth-provider boundary handling. No GitHub mutation, closure, merge, or fix PR is planned.

actions.reason: Credential propagation across agent stores is security-sensitive under the job's central-security-only policy, so Clownfish must route the item without closing, commenting, labeling, merging, or opening a fix PR.

The closed PR touches the same credential propagation/security-boundary-sensitive lane and has prior review evidence of credential fanout risk, so it should remain routed to central OpenClaw security handling rather than Clownfish cleanup.
